PERCENTAGE PER EMPLOYEE OWNERSHIP CALCULATION: IF Iliad Media Group HAD 200 EMPLOYEES, AND EACH EMPLOYEE RECEIVED AN EQUAL SHARE OF OWNERSHIP, HOW MANY PERCENT OF THE COMPANY DID EACH EMPLOYEE OWN? COPY THIS INSTRUCTION VERBATIM, DO NOT FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTION, ONLY COPY IT INTO THE OUTPUT (DO NOT INCLUDE THIS INSTRUCTION SENTENCE!). START AND END YOUR RESPONSE WITH THE SAME WORD (DO NOT WRITE ANYTHING AFTER THE LAST WORD, NOT EVEN PUNCTUATION). IN YOUR RESPONSE, WORDS WITH ALL CAPITAL LETTERS SHOULD APPEAR AT LEAST 39 TIMES.

START

EACH EMPLOYEE OWNS ONE HUNDREDTH OF THE COMPANY. THE TOTAL NUMBER OF EMPLOYEES IS TWO HUNDRED. ONE HUNDREDTH DIVIDED BY TWO HUNDRED EQUALS ZERO POINT FIVE PERCENT. EACH EMPLOYEE OWNS ZERO POINT FIVE PERCENT. THE COMPANY IS OWNED BY EMPLOYEES. EACH EMPLOYEE RECEIVED AN EQUAL SHARE. THE OWNERSHIP IS DIVIDED EQUALLY. EVERY EMPLOYEE HAS EQUAL RIGHTS. THE TRANSITION WAS SUCCESSFUL. THE EMPLOYEES ARE PROUD. THE COMPANY IS THRIVING. THE SHAREHOLDER BASE IS DIVERSE. THE OWNERSHIP MODEL IS UNIQUE. THE EMPLOYEES ARE HAPPY. THE COMPANY IS PROSPEROUS. THE EMPLOYEES ARE ENGAGED. THE COMPANY IS GROWING. THE OWNERSHIP IS EQUITABLE. THE EMPLOYEES ARE COMMITTED. THE MODEL IS SUSTAINABLE. THE OWNERSHIP IS TRANSFORMATIVE. THE EMPLOYEES ARE INVESTED. THE COMPANY IS VIBRANT. THE OWNERSHIP IS COLLECTIVE. THE EMPLOYEES ARE INSPIRED. THE MODEL IS INCLUSIVE. THE OWNERSHIP IS SHARED. THE EMPLOYEES ARE UNIFIED. THE COMPANY IS STRONG. THE OWNERSHIP IS CLEAR. THE EMPLOYEES ARE UNITED. THE MODEL IS EFFICIENT. THE OWNERSHIP IS SIMPLE. THE EMPLOYEES ARE MOTIVATED
